description: MathML structures вАФ fractions (Antoine / simple / compound), radicals, sub/superscripts.

cases.note: Antoine: number_sign + 1(upper) + 2(lower)
Antoine 1/3
Antoine 2/3
Antoine 5/8
Antoine 5/6
Antoine 7/8
simple: digit / letter вЖТ slash bar
simple: letter / letter
simple: x / y
simple: greek / digit
simple: letter / greek
compound: open + numerator + blank + bar + denom + close
compound with digit/poly denom
compound: letter / poly
typed slash routes through Antoine
typed slash with letter denom
simple: nested fraction over digit (single structure / single structure)
simple: digit over nested fraction
compound: both operands are nested SIMPLE fractions (no fence), so the outer wraps in fraction.open в†Ж вА¶ fraction.close в†∞ вАФ numerator a/b then blank+bar then denominator c/d
simple: sqrt over digit (sqrt.close self-fences numerator)
simple: digit over sqrt
simple: sqrt over sqrt
simple: 1 over sqrt(2)
simple: msup over digit (atomic-lower-digit closes script)
simple: digit over msup
deep nest (ARCHITECTURE.md ¬І10): nested simple-fraction NUMERATOR over letter вАФ the inner a/b has no fence, so the outer takes compound form в†ЖвА¶в†∞: open, a/b, blank, bar, c, close

deep nest: nested simple-fraction DENOMINATOR вАФ compound form в†ЖвА¶в†∞: open, a, blank, bar, b/c, close. Distinct from the numerator-nested case above (blank sits after a, not after a/b), so (a/b)/c and a/(b/c) are no longer ambiguous
deep nest: Antoine fraction over Antoine fraction вЖТ (1/2)/(3/4) as slash-joined Antoine pairs

deep nest: triple nesting. Innermost a/b is simple вЖТ middle (a/b)/c is compound в†ЖвА¶в†∞ (self-fenced). The outer numerator is now a fenced compound fraction, so the outer is back to simple form: compound(a/b/c) bar d
deep nest: sqrt over sqrt (each radical self-fences with close в†є before/after the bar)
deep nest (ARCHITECTURE.md ¬І10): 1 over sqrt of a polynomial with superscript inside the radical
sqrt(x): open + indicator + x + close
sqrt(2): includes number_sign inside
sqrt over polynomial
sqrt with superscript inside
sqrt over a + b
sqrt(2x): number_sign before 2
sqrt of greek letter
cube root: open + degree + indicator + x + close
fourth root with degree 4
nth root: degree is letter n
deep nest (ARCHITECTURE.md ¬І10): radical inside radical вАФ two opens then two closes в†єв†є unwind the nesting
deep nest: triple-nested sqrt вАФ three opens, three closes; verifies fence balance at depth 3
deep nest: simple fraction inside a radical (a/b sits between the radical fences)
deep nest: radical over a polynomial with two superscripts (x^2 + y^2)
msup atomic digit: sup_marker + lower-form 2 (no close)
msup atomic 3
msup atomic 0 (lower-form в†і)
msup atomic 9 (lower-form в†Ф)
msup single letter n: close в†± bounds the script (еНХе≠ЧжѓНи¶Б close)
msub atomic digit 0
msub atomic digit 1 (lower-form в†В)
msub single letter n: close в†± (еНХе≠ЧжѓНи¶Б close)
msub single letter i: close в†±
msubsup atomic: sub first, then sup
msubsup: letter sub i then letter sup j, each closed with в†±
a sub n: single letter вЖТ close в†±
complex sub: not atomic so close emitted
complex sup: emits script_close after
complex sub with polynomial
e to the x: single letter sup вЖТ close в†±
e to minus x: not atomic, gets script_close
y to pi: single greek letter sup вЖТ close в†± (е≠ЧжѓНеРЂеЄМиЕКе≠ЧжѓН)
x sub minus 1: minus + 1 wrapped with close

equation_systems.description: \begin{cases} / \left\{вА¶\right. вАФ {-fenced <mtable> with no closing fence; per-row brace segments в†О(first)/в†З(middle)/в†£(last) each followed by one blank cell, one print row per braille line (LINE_BREAK_CELL вЖТ \n)

cases.note: two rows: first в†О + last в†£, no middle segment, one line each, blank after each segment
three rows exercise the middle segment в†З; \right. arrives as an empty postfix <mo> and is consumed
single row degrades to the plain left brace в†™ вАФ print form is a one-line {
bare \\ outside a table env (<mspace linebreak=newline>) вЖТ forced line break
matrix rows land one per line too (¬І17 иІДеИЩ1)
